MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold Evje for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, who is present.
C.J. Kingsley, Limited Scope Attorney for Defendant James Baker, who is present.

Settlement Conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the signed agreement, which was filed with the court for premises located at 909 geary street #512, San Francisco, CA. See scanned document. The trial date of 12/29/08 is vacated.
